raw_consumer_statement:
Hello, On Dispute Number : XXXX I had an American Express Agent call me and discuss the details on the phone. The first thing they said was " This is a recorded line '' and we continued our conversation. During that conversation the Agent said ( paraphrasing but listen to the recoding ), that the signatures do not match up.

They continued to deny me my refund because the merchant provided signatures for my disputes, but on the call the Agent admitted that none of the signatures matched up. So i supplied additional materials of the invoice they gave me with NO SIGNATURE at all just my typed name, and a letter of testimony from a witness and phone number to call to verify what happened. The recorded testimony admits ( they recorded the call ) that the signatures do not match up at all. They proceeded to ask for additional documentation which I provided. But at the end of the day they sent a letter back saying the merchant provided signatures and that is good enough. That is amazing to me after what the American Express Agent said on the recording. 

We are going to small claims court to resolve this at this point unless American Express decides to listen to the recording, look at the evidence I provided. The date is set for XX/XX/XXXX in XXXX XXXX. I really hope that whatever agent is looking at this listens to the call and realizes that nothing is adding up. They ask for additional materials which I then provided to them. This is getting redicilous that the XXXX not only is getting money from Me/Amex but also the Insurance, and I had to have the sugery RE-DONE in XXXX because they XXXX it and will XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX properly ever again. 

This is insanity and I hope we can come to a resolution before I got to Small Claims Court to plead my case with my 20+ documents of evidence that proves this is fraud. All I get back it a letter saying the merchant shows signatures on the receipts. Even when they don't match up and are charged at random times. 

I can't stress this enough, they took my items when I want into the XXXX, then used my card when I was in the XXXX XXXX XXXX  and forged my signature. 

Thanks, XXXX
